## NYT::NFlow::NBigRTExtensions::TDynamicProfileJoinerSpec {#NYT_NFlow_NBigRTExtensions_TDynamicProfileJoinerSpec}

Source: [yt/yt/flow/yandex/extensions/bigrt/cpp/serializable_profile/state_manager/spec.h]({{source-root}}/yt/yt/flow/yandex/extensions/bigrt/cpp/serializable_profile/state_manager/spec.h)

#|
|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `reset_malformed_state` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `false`
Sometimes code has memory overruns and other bugs that can corrupt arbitrary data in the program. As a result, states may become corrupted and written incorrectly to {{product-name}}. Loading corrupted states will throw an exception and stop processing. This option lets you treat corrupted states as empty and continue processing. It is essentially an emergency option that should not be used in normal mode. ||
|| `discard_unknown_fields` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `false`
Enables discarding unknown protobuf fields. ||
|| `cache` | **Type**: `NYT::TIntrusivePtr<`[NYT::NFlow::TDynamicExpiringJobNamedStateCacheSpec](./all_yson_structs#NYT_NFlow_TDynamicExpiringJobNamedStateCacheSpec)`>`
**Default value**: `{}`
 ||
|| `row_load_options` | **Type**: `NYT::NFlow::NBigRTExtensions::TRowLoadOptionsSpec`
**Default value**: `{'column_filter': [], 'enable_partial_result': false, 'enable_versioned_lookup_logging': true, 'keep_missing_rows': true, 'replica_consistency': 'sync', 'sync_last_committed': true, 'timeout': 60000, 'use_versioned_lookup': false}`
 ||
